blockingIssues.description: Trend view still hardcodes correlations to an empty array (`src/app/api/views/trend/route.ts`), so valid requested correlation pairs are never computed and VAL-TREND-005 remains unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the milestone scope conflict by aligning guidance with the validation contract: either require Trend correlation computation for api-and-jobs or remove VAL-TREND-005 from this milestone.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review fix-view-endpoints-viewer-auth still found unresolved blocking issue because trend route returns `correlations: []` while validation-contract requires computed correlations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit API-route auth checklist items for API-key scope enforcement and viewer date-window clamping, including secondary lookups (e.g., event_id).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Initial api-and-jobs scrutiny failures and subsequent fix feature both centered on missing scope/clamp checks in annotation and view endpoints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce procedure-adherence reporting around tests-first/TDD and manual verification so `followedProcedure` reflects actual execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple review reports observed implementation-before-tests with handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true, reducing feedback signal quality.
